goal: Install a self-contained teacher-guided DNA to RNA to protein lesson layer into the current V1 Roblox cell scene.
changes: Added a standalone lesson installer that does not rebuild water, spawn, or imported organelle meshes.
Created Workspace.V1LessonRuntime with seven non-colliding lesson stations.
Created ReplicatedStorage.V1LessonRemotes with LessonState and LessonAction RemoteEvents.
Installed ServerScriptService.V1GeneExpressionLessonController to own progression, proximity gating, micro-check validation, and overlay animations.
Installed StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts.V1TeacherLessonClient to create the teacher HUD, guide marker, beam, Continue button, and answer buttons.
Added self-contained gene-expression overlays for transcription, mRNA export, translation, protein handoff, and recap.
Kept action ids aligned to existing biology concepts: transcribe_gene, export_mrna, translate_mrna, protein_handoff.
Kept V1 water and V1_WaterSpawn intact.
validation: Live Studio bridge contract probe passed for runtime, remotes, scripts, station count, prompt count, non-collision, water samples, and spawn invariant.
manual_play_review_needed: Press Play and confirm V1TeacherLessonUI appears.
Confirm the local guide marker points to each station.
Confirm Continue advances only when near a station.
Confirm micro-check buttons appear only in range.
Confirm transcription, mRNA export, translation, and protein handoff overlays animate.
Confirm mobile/VR controls can tap/press lesson controls without keyboard-only dependency.
next_recommended_phase: Run a play-mode review and tune station positions/UI scale from the actual player camera if any target is too hard to reach or see.
